vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual state. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/unidentifiable. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not visible as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable biological remnant, though it is in a state of severe decline.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Critical Decline: Pothos specimen remains but is severely desiccated.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in black pot.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: Single leaf remaining, showing chlorosis and wilting. The white rabbit anchor is present but the plant is failing.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of crushed eggshells in the black pot (P3/P4 area), likely an attempt at calcium supplementation or pest deterrent, now serving as inert debris.
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: A small electronic component (likely a header pin or connector) appears on the desk surface in T-4 and T-3, then disappears.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Pothos leaf is turgid and green. P1 yellow pot is empty.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-2: Pothos leaf begins to lose turgor pressure and droop.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Total collapse of the Pothos leaf; the specimen is now effectively necrotic or severely dehydrated. Lighting conditions have degraded, making observation difficult.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total collapse. The lack of light (implied by the darkness of the final images) and potential lack of hydration have led to the death of the Pothos specimen. The other pots are devoid of vegetation.
vision_report.anomalies: Presence of non-botanical debris (eggshells, electronic component).
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical collection has suffered a catastrophic failure. Starting from a state where a single Pothos leaf was struggling, the environment has transitioned into a dark, neglected state where the remaining plant matter has withered completely. The presence of eggshells suggests an intervention that failed to stabilize the health of the specimens.
